Fin - Fin is a single Customer Agent that can take on different roles, depending on what the conversation needs.

 Intelli - Intelli is a Customer Support Platform that streamlines conversations and interactions between businesses and their customers across multiple channels using AI.

 Kadoink AI - Gather people instantly by AI txt, video, or ringing phones Tell Kadoink Who You Need. [...] Faahh - Faahhh is a tiny focus app that interrupts you the moment you drift.

 Pop - Pop makes voice notes first class in everyday messaging.

 Synci - Synci is an all-in-one AI soundtrack platform built for content creators.

 Oriane - 91% of internet bandwidth is led by videos that your AI does NOT watch.
